name: game_date
description: The game date this injury status applies to (YYYY-MM-DD)

name: player_name
description: Full player name as printed in the official NBA injury report

name: team
description: NBA team name (as printed in report — e.g. 'Atlanta Hawks')

name: matchup
description: Matchup string from the report (e.g. 'ATL @ BOS')

name: game_time
description: Scheduled game time from the report (e.g. '7:30 pm ET')

name: status
description: Player injury status: Out | Doubtful | Questionable | Probable | Available

name: reason
description: Injury reason text from the report (e.g. 'Knee - Left; Soreness')

name: report_timestamp
description: The report publication timestamp used to fetch this snapshot (ET)

name: scraped_at
description: UTC timestamp when this record was scraped
